sections.sectionTitle: Zofar in Job Mawhna Nei-in Ngawh

verses.text: Tua ciangin Naamah gammi Zofar in dawng a
“Kampau hih zahta hong kidawnglo ding sa a, kam tam pauna hangin thumanin hong kiseh dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam
Job aw, na thugente hong dawng theilo dingin hong ngaihsun na hi hiam? Na simmawh kampaute hong kidawng mawh dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam
Nangma thugente a man na sa kha a, Pasian' muhna-ah a siangtho dingin na kingaihsun kha hi
Pasian in na thugente hong dawngkik leh ut mahmah ing
Pilna nam tampi a omna thu, mihing' theih zawhloh thuthuk, a omna thu hong gen ding hi. Na mawhna zahin Pasian in gim hong piaklohna thei in
“Pasian' thuthuk thei khinzo ding na hi hiam? Vanglianpa' hih theihna thei khinzo ding na hi hiam
Vantung sangin Pasian sangzaw a, ahi zongin tua vantung nangawn na banzo kei hi. Pasian in leinuai thu thei a, ahi zongin nangmah in tua thu na thei kei hi
Pasian' liatna pen leitung sangin golzaw a, tuipi sangin zaizaw hi
Pasian in nang hong manin thu hong sit leh amah a khaktan ding kua om ahi hiam
Pasian in mi hoihlote thei takpi hi. Mawhna a muh ciangin thudonlo ding ahi hiam
Gamlaka om late mihing suak ngei ding a, mihaite pil ngei ding ahi hiam
“Job aw, na lungsim a hoihin bawl in la, Pasian' lamah kihei in
Khialhna na bawl khak leh paiikhia in la, na inn sungah gitlohna omsak kei in
Tua hi leh kisuan'na omloin na khuadak ngam ding a, na lung nuamin launa na nei kei ding hi
Na lungkhamnate veng ding a, tuikhang pak bangin na phawk nawn kei ding hi
Tua ciangin na nuntakna, sun sangin taangzaw ding a, nuntak lungzin' pen hun, sun sangin taangzaw ding hi
Lungnuam tak leh lametna nei-in na om ding a, Pasian in nang hong hu-in, tawldamna hong pia ding hi
Kuamah kihtak neiloin nuamtakin na om ding a, mi tampi in nangma maipha hong zong ding uh hi
Ahih hangin migilote ahih leh cimawhin khuadak ding uh a, suahtakna ding lampi mulo ding uh hi. Amau' ngah ding ahih leh sihna bek ahi hi,” a ci hi.
